task_completion.description: SolveSpace application is open with a 2D sketch canvas visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace GUI is visible on the screen, showing the 3D/2D workspace.

task_completion.description: A rectangular outer boundary is drawn and constrained to 200 mm width and 350 mm height.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rectangle is visible in the sketch with distance constraints showing '200' for the width and '350' for the height.

task_completion.description: Two circular cutouts are drawn and constrained to the correct diameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two circles are visible inside the rectangle. The upper circle has a diameter constraint of '75' (or radius '37.5') and the lower circle has a diameter constraint of '145' (or radius '72.5').

task_completion.description: The two circles are vertically aligned with each other and centered horizontally within the rectangle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The centers of both circles lie on the same vertical axis, and there are constraints or visual indications that they are centered horizontally relative to the rectangle's width.

task_completion.description: The upper circle is positioned 80 mm from the top edge, and the distance between the two circle centers is 130 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A distance constraint of '80' is visible between the top edge of the rectangle and the center of the upper circle. Another distance constraint of '130' is visible between the centers of the two circles.

task_completion.description: The layout file is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace window title bar or a save dialog shows the filename 'speaker_baffle.slvs' and indicates the path '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to create the sketch.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with SolveSpace menus, toolbars, and the graphical canvas, rather than writing code or text in a terminal/editor.

integrity.description: The constraints shown in the canvas are actual SolveSpace constraint labels.
integrity.visual_evidence: The dimension numbers and alignment symbols match SolveSpace's native UI rendering style for constraints, not text annotations added externally.

integrity.description: The agent built the sketch from scratch.
integrity.visual_evidence: Earlier screenshots show an empty canvas or the progressive construction of the geometry, rather than a fully completed file being opened immediately.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output is a SolveSpace file named 'speaker_baffle.slvs' saved in '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/'. The sketch must contain a rectangle constrained to 200 mm width and 350 mm height. Inside, there must be two circles: an upper tweeter (75 mm diameter / 37.5 mm radius) and a lower woofer (145 mm diameter / 72.5 mm radius). The tweeter center must be 80 mm from the top edge, and the distance between the two circle centers must be 130 mm. The circles must be horizontally centered and vertically aligned.
